raw_consumer_statement: I hired a lawyer. That person did no work for me. My original claim was {$4100.00} and then changed to {$1000.00} after receiving a partial check for no work done. I was been repeated given wrong info on where to send my proof to that supports that person did XXXX of the work I paid them to do. I am very unhappy with how they have handled things and believe they have broken many FCBA for not following the rules that are leading to my account about to be closed as well. My credit score is getting impacted which from my understanding goes against the FCRA duty.
